subject: Urgent Request: Software Engineer
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

IronCastle Studios (gaming) is looking for a lead Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 1000 SEK/h

Required tech:
• TypeScript
• Docker Compose
• Redis

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
